title: DLSA Kolkata Accountant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: District Legal Services Authority Kolkata (DLSA Kolkata)
short_info: The latest District Legal Services Authority Kolkata (DLSA Kolkata) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Accountant posts! Released through official notification No.01 Dt.17.04.2026, this recruitment drive offers 1 vacancy for eligible candidates seeking government jobs in the legal services sector.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 24 years Maximum Age: 35 years

qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree (with first-class or high second-class) in Commerce (B.Com) with Advanced Accountancy or equivalent from any recognized university. M.Com / professional qualifications like CA (Inter)/ICWA/etc. preferred. Minimum 03 years experience in core accounting work including preparation of financial statements, budget, audit reply. Proficient knowledge of accounting software(s) such as Tally Prime, PFMS and M.S. Excel mandatory.

selection_process: Walk-in-Interview Preparation of initial merit list of 5 candidates Online live interview by SLSA WB Final approval by Hon'ble Executive Chairman
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Kolkata Accountant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Kolkata Accountant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Accountant post at DLSA Kolkata is 31st May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Accountant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Commerce (B.Com) with Advanced Accountancy or equivalent, preferably with first-class or high second-class marks. Proficiency in Tally Prime, PFMS, and MS Excel is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Accountant recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Accountant post is between 24 years and 35 years as of 31st January 2026. Age relaxation rules may apply as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Accountant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Accountant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 15,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Accountant announced by the District Legal Services Authority Kolkata.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DLSA Kolkata Accountant recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Accountant position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in-Interview, followed by the preparation of an initial merit list of 5 candidates. An online live interview will be conducted by SLSA WB, with final approval from the Hon'ble Executive Chairman.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Accountant post at DLSA Kolkata.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Accountant post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is No.01 Dt.17.04.2026.
